title: rubus vulcanicola
intro: Rubus vulcanicola, also known as the volcanic raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Rubus vulcanicola has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, and its health benefits are attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Rubus vulcanicola include infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to food products.
